settingsFields.name: _simulatedSedEdit
settingsFields.describe: Internal: pre-computed sed edit result from preview

settingsFields.name: accessToken
settingsFields.describe: @internal Fresh OAuth access token returned by the SDK host getOAuthToken callback, or null when the host has no token available.

settingsFields.name: action
settingsFields.describe: Hook input for the ElicitationResult event. Fired after the user responds to an MCP elicitation. Hooks can observe or override the response before it is sent to the server.

settingsFields.name: addBlockedBy
settingsFields.describe: Task IDs that block this task

settingsFields.name: addBlocks
settingsFields.describe: Task IDs that this task blocks

settingsFields.name: added
settingsFields.describe: Names of servers that were added

settingsFields.name: additionalDirectories
settingsFields.describe: Additional directories to include in the permission scope

settingsFields.name: additions
settingsFields.describe: GitHub owner/repo when available

settingsFields.name: advisorModel
settingsFields.describe: Advisor model for the server-side advisor tool.

settingsFields.name: agent
settingsFields.describe: Company announcements to display at startup (one will be randomly selected if multiple are provided)

settingsFields.name: agent_id
settingsFields.describe: Subagent identifier. Present only when the hook fires from within a subagent (e.g., a tool called by an AgentTool worker). Absent for the main thread, even in --agent sessions. Use this field (not agent_type) to distinguish subagent calls from main-thread calls.

settingsFields.name: agent_transcript_path
settingsFields.describe: Text content of the last assistant message before stopping. Avoids the need to read and parse the transcript file.

settingsFields.name: agentProgressSummaries
settingsFields.describe: Initializes the SDK session with hooks, MCP servers, and agent configuration.

settingsFields.name: agents
settingsFields.describe: Path to additional agent file (in addition to those in the agents/ directory, if it exists), relative to the plugin root

settingsFields.name: allow
settingsFields.describe: Rules for the auto mode classifier allow section

settingsFields.name: allowAllUnixSockets
settingsFields.describe: If true, allow all Unix sockets (disables blocking on both platforms).

settingsFields.name: allowed_domains
settingsFields.describe: Only include search results from these domains

settingsFields.name: allowedDomains
settingsFields.describe: When true (and set in managed settings), only allowedDomains and WebFetch(domain:...) allow rules from managed settings are respected. User, project, local, and flag settings domains are ignored. Denied domains are still respected from all sources.

settingsFields.name: allowedEnvVars
settingsFields.describe: Explicit list of environment variable names that may be interpolated in header values. Only variables listed here will be resolved; all other $VAR references are left as empty strings. Required for env var interpolation to work.

settingsFields.name: allowedMcpServers
settingsFields.describe: Enterprise allowlist of MCP servers that can be used. Applies to all scopes including enterprise servers from managed-mcp.json. If undefined, all servers are allowed. If empty array, no servers are allowed. Denylist takes precedence - if a server is on both lists, it is denied.

settingsFields.name: allowedPrompts
settingsFields.describe: Prompt-based permissions needed to implement the plan. These describe categories of actions rather than specific commands.

settingsFields.name: allowedTools
settingsFields.describe: Tools allowed when command runs

settingsFields.name: allowManagedDomainsOnly
settingsFields.describe: When true (and set in managed settings), only allowedDomains and WebFetch(domain:...) allow rules from managed settings are respected. User, project, local, and flag settings domains are ignored. Denied domains are still respected from all sources.

settingsFields.name: allowManagedHooksOnly
settingsFields.describe: When true (and set in managed settings), only hooks from managed settings run. User, project, and local hooks are ignored.

settingsFields.name: allowManagedMcpServersOnly
settingsFields.describe: When true (and set in managed settings), allowedMcpServers is only read from managed settings. deniedMcpServers still merges from all sources, so users can deny servers for themselves. Users can still add their own MCP servers, but only the admin-defined allowlist applies.

settingsFields.name: allowManagedPermissionRulesOnly
settingsFields.describe: When true (and set in managed settings), only permission rules (allow/deny/ask) from managed settings are respected. User, project, local, and CLI argument permission rules are ignored.

settingsFields.name: allowManagedReadPathsOnly
settingsFields.describe: When true (set in managed settings), only allowRead paths from policySettings are used.

settingsFields.name: allowRead
settingsFields.describe: Paths to re-allow reading within denyRead regions. Takes precedence over denyRead for matching paths.

settingsFields.name: allowUnixSockets
settingsFields.describe: macOS only: Unix socket paths to allow. Ignored on Linux (seccomp cannot filter by path).

settingsFields.name: allowUnsandboxedCommands
settingsFields.describe: Allow commands to run outside the sandbox via the dangerouslyDisableSandbox parameter. When false, the dangerouslyDisableSandbox parameter is completely ignored and all commands must run sandboxed. Default: true.

settingsFields.name: allowWrite
settingsFields.describe: Additional paths to allow writing within the sandbox. Merged with paths from Edit(...) allow permission rules.

settingsFields.name: alwaysThinkingEnabled
settingsFields.describe: When false, thinking is disabled. When absent or true, thinking is enabled automatically for supported models.

settingsFields.name: annotations
settingsFields.describe: Tools provided by this server (available when connected)

settingsFields.name: answers
settingsFields.describe: User answers collected by the permission component

settingsFields.name: apiKeyHelper
settingsFields.describe: Path to a script that outputs authentication values

settingsFields.name: apiUsage
settingsFields.describe: Breakdown of current context window usage by category (system prompt, tools, messages, etc.).

settingsFields.name: appendSubagentSystemPrompt
settingsFields.describe: @internal Additional system prompt appended to every Task-tool subagent (and propagated to nested subagents). Gated by CLAUDE_CODE_ENABLE_APPEND_SUBAGENT_PROMPT.

settingsFields.name: appendSystemPrompt
settingsFields.describe: @internal Additional system prompt appended to every Task-tool subagent (and propagated to nested subagents). Gated by CLAUDE_CODE_ENABLE_APPEND_SUBAGENT_PROMPT.

settingsFields.name: args
settingsFields.describe: Custom ripgrep configuration for bundled ripgrep support

settingsFields.name: argumentHint
settingsFields.describe: Default model for this command

settingsFields.name: ask
settingsFields.describe: List of permission rules that should always prompt for confirmation

settingsFields.name: assistantAutoBackgrounded
settingsFields.describe: True if the command was auto-backgrounded by the assistant-mode blocking budget

settingsFields.name: async
settingsFields.describe: If true, hook runs in background without blocking

settingsFields.name: asyncRewake
settingsFields.describe: If true, hook runs in background and wakes the model on exit code 2 (blocking error). Implies async.

settingsFields.name: attachments
settingsFields.describe: Optional file paths (absolute or relative to cwd) to attach. Use for photos, screenshots, diffs, logs, or any file the user should see alongside your message.

settingsFields.name: attachmentsByType
settingsFields.describe: Breakdown of current context window usage by category (system prompt, tools, messages, etc.).

settingsFields.name: attempt
settingsFields.describe: Emitted when an API request fails with a retryable error and will be retried after a delay. error_status is null for connection errors (e.g. timeouts) that had no HTTP response.

settingsFields.name: attribution
settingsFields.describe: Attribution text for git commits, including any trailers. Empty string hides attribution.

settingsFields.name: auto
settingsFields.describe: @internal Absolute directory paths for the auto-memory and team-memory stores. Lets SDK renderers classify Read/Write/Edit tool calls on these paths as memory operations without re-implementing CLI path detection.

settingsFields.name: autoAllowBashIfSandboxed
settingsFields.describe: Allow commands to run outside the sandbox via the dangerouslyDisableSandbox parameter. When false, the dangerouslyDisableSandbox parameter is completely ignored and all commands must run sandboxed. Default: true.

settingsFields.name: autoCompactWindow
settingsFields.describe: Auto-compact window size

settingsFields.name: autoDreamEnabled
settingsFields.describe: Enable background memory consolidation (auto-dream). When set, overrides the server-side default.

settingsFields.name: autoMemoryDirectory
settingsFields.describe: Custom directory path for auto-memory storage. Supports ~/ prefix for home directory expansion. Ignored if set in projectSettings (checked-in .claude/settings.json) for security. When unset, defaults to ~/.claude/projects/<sanitized-cwd>/memory/.

settingsFields.name: autoMemoryEnabled
settingsFields.describe: Enable auto-memory for this project. When false, Claude will not read from or write to the auto-memory directory.

settingsFields.name: autoMode
settingsFields.describe: Rules for the auto mode classifier allow section

settingsFields.name: autoSubmit
settingsFields.describe: Submit the prompt when hold-to-talk is released (hold mode only)

settingsFields.name: autoUpdate
settingsFields.describe: Whether to automatically update this marketplace and its installed plugins on startup

settingsFields.name: autoUpdatesChannel
settingsFields.describe: Release channel for auto-updates (latest or stable)

settingsFields.name: available_output_styles
settingsFields.describe: @internal CLI process PID for tmux socket isolation

settingsFields.name: awaitingLeaderApproval
settingsFields.describe: When true, the teammate has sent a plan approval request to the team leader

settingsFields.name: awaySummaryEnabled
settingsFields.describe: @internal When false, the session recap (shown when you return after being away for 5+ minutes) is disabled. When absent or true, recap is enabled. Hidden from public SDK types until external launch; mirrors voiceHandsfree pattern above.

settingsFields.name: awsAuthRefresh
settingsFields.describe: Path to a script that refreshes AWS authentication

settingsFields.name: awsCredentialExport
settingsFields.describe: Path to a script that exports AWS credentials

settingsFields.name: backgroundedByUser
settingsFields.describe: True if the user manually backgrounded the command with Ctrl+B

settingsFields.name: backgroundTaskId
settingsFields.describe: ID of the background task if command is running in background

settingsFields.name: base64
settingsFields.describe: Base64-encoded image data

settingsFields.name: blobSavedTo
settingsFields.describe: Path where binary blob content was saved

settingsFields.name: blocked_domains
settingsFields.describe: Never include search results from these domains

settingsFields.name: blocked_path
settingsFields.describe: Requests permission to use a tool with the given input.

settingsFields.name: blockedMarketplaces
settingsFields.describe: Enterprise blocklist of marketplace sources. When set in managed settings, these exact sources are blocked from being added as marketplaces. The check happens BEFORE downloading, so blocked sources never touch the filesystem.

settingsFields.name: body
settingsFields.describe: Required for create and update; optional for run

settingsFields.name: budgetTokens
settingsFields.describe: Fixed thinking token budget (older models)

settingsFields.name: bytes
settingsFields.describe: Size of the fetched content in bytes

settingsFields.name: callback_id
settingsFields.describe: Delivers a hook callback with its input data.

settingsFields.name: callback_url
settingsFields.describe: The full callback URL from the browser address bar after authorizing, e.g. http://localhost:<port>/callback?code=...&state=...

settingsFields.name: callTokens
settingsFields.describe: Breakdown of current context window usage by category (system prompt, tools, messages, etc.).

settingsFields.name: cancelled
settingsFields.describe: Result of a cancel_async_message operation. cancelled=false means the message was not in the queue (already dequeued or never enqueued).

settingsFields.name: canReadOutputFile
settingsFields.describe: Whether the calling agent has Read/Bash tools to check progress

settingsFields.name: canRewind
settingsFields.describe: Result of a rewindFiles operation.

settingsFields.name: capabilities
settingsFields.describe: Status information for an MCP server connection.

settingsFields.name: category
settingsFields.describe: Tags for searchability and discovery

settingsFields.name: cell_id
settingsFields.describe: The ID of the cell to edit. When inserting a new cell, the new cell will be inserted after the cell with this ID, or at the beginning if not specified.

settingsFields.name: cell_type
settingsFields.describe: The type of the cell (code or markdown). If not specified, it defaults to the current cell type. If using edit_mode=insert, this is required.

settingsFields.name: cells
settingsFields.describe: Array of notebook cells

settingsFields.name: changes
settingsFields.describe: GitHub owner/repo when available

settingsFields.name: channelsEnabled
settingsFields.describe: Teams/Enterprise opt-in for channel notifications (MCP servers with the claude/channel capability pushing inbound messages). Default off. Set true to allow; users then select servers via --channels.

settingsFields.name: character
settingsFields.describe: The character offset (1-based, as shown in editors)

settingsFields.name: clampedDelaySeconds
settingsFields.describe: Actual delay used after clamping to runtime bounds

settingsFields.name: cleanupPeriodDays
settingsFields.describe: Number of days to retain chat transcripts before automatic cleanup (default: 30). Minimum 1. Use a large value for long retention; use --no-session-persistence to disable transcript writes entirely.

settingsFields.name: code
settingsFields.describe: HTTP response code

settingsFields.name: codeText
settingsFields.describe: HTTP response code text

settingsFields.name: color
settingsFields.describe: Loop-side text notification. Mirrors the interactive REPL notification queue (key/priority/timeout). JSX notifications are not emitted on this channel.

settingsFields.name: command
settingsFields.describe: Custom ripgrep configuration for bundled ripgrep support

settingsFields.name: commandName
settingsFields.describe: The name of the skill

settingsFields.name: commands
settingsFields.describe: Path to additional command file or skill directory (in addition to those in the commands/ directory, if it exists), relative to the plugin root

settingsFields.name: commit
settingsFields.describe: Attribution text for git commits, including any trailers. Empty string hides attribution.

settingsFields.name: compact_summary
settingsFields.describe: The conversation summary produced by compaction

settingsFields.name: companyAnnouncements
settingsFields.describe: Company announcements to display at startup (one will be randomly selected if multiple are provided)

settingsFields.name: content
settingsFields.describe: Inline markdown content for the command

settingsFields.name: contents
settingsFields.describe: Resource URI

settingsFields.name: context
settingsFields.describe: UI context where these bindings apply. Global bindings work everywhere.

settingsFields.name: contextWindow
settingsFields.describe: Config scope for settings.

settingsFields.name: costUSD
settingsFields.describe: Config scope for settings.

settingsFields.name: count
settingsFields.describe: Number of pages extracted

settingsFields.name: createdAt
settingsFields.describe: Session metadata returned by listSessions and getSessionInfo.

settingsFields.name: criticalSystemReminder_EXPERIMENTAL
settingsFields.describe: Experimental: Critical reminder added to system prompt

settingsFields.name: cron
settingsFields.describe: The prompt to enqueue at each fire time.

settingsFields.name: custom_instructions
settingsFields.describe: The conversation summary produced by compaction

settingsFields.name: customTitle
settingsFields.describe: User-set session title via /rename.

settingsFields.name: cwd
settingsFields.describe: Subagent identifier. Present only when the hook fires from within a subagent (e.g., a tool called by an AgentTool worker). Absent for the main thread, even in --agent sessions. Use this field (not agent_type) to distinguish subagent calls from main-thread calls.

settingsFields.name: dangerouslyDisableSandbox
settingsFields.describe: Flag to indicate if sandbox mode was overridden

settingsFields.name: decision_reason
settingsFields.describe: Requests permission to use a tool with the given input.

settingsFields.name: default
settingsFields.describe: Default value used when the user provides nothing

settingsFields.name: defaultEnvironmentId
settingsFields.describe: Default environment ID to use for remote sessions

settingsFields.name: defaultMode
settingsFields.describe: Default permission mode when Claude Code needs access

settingsFields.name: defaultShell
settingsFields.describe: When true (and set in managed settings), only hooks from managed settings run. User, project, and local hooks are ignored.

settingsFields.name: defaultView
settingsFields.describe: Default transcript view: chat (SendUserMessage checkpoints only) or transcript (full)

settingsFields.name: delaySeconds
settingsFields.describe: Seconds from now to wake up. Clamped to [60, 3600] by the runtime.

settingsFields.name: deletions
settingsFields.describe: Result of a rewindFiles operation.

settingsFields.name: deniedMcpServers
settingsFields.describe: Enterprise denylist of MCP servers that are explicitly blocked. If a server is on the denylist, it will be blocked across all scopes including enterprise. Denylist takes precedence over allowlist - if a server is on both lists, it is denied.

settingsFields.name: deny
settingsFields.describe: List of permission rules for denied operations

settingsFields.name: denyRead
settingsFields.describe: Additional paths to deny reading within the sandbox. Merged with paths from Read(...) deny permission rules.

settingsFields.name: denyWrite
settingsFields.describe: Additional paths to deny writing within the sandbox. Merged with paths from Edit(...) deny permission rules.

settingsFields.name: dependencies
settingsFields.describe: Brief, user-facing explanation of what these hooks provide

settingsFields.name: description
settingsFields.describe: Brief, user-facing explanation of what the plugin provides

settingsFields.name: destructive
settingsFields.describe: Tools provided by this server (available when connected)

settingsFields.name: dialog_kind
settingsFields.describe: Dialog-specific data passed to the host renderer. Shape is defined per dialog_kind; the protocol transports it opaquely.

settingsFields.name: dimensions
settingsFields.describe: Original image width in pixels

settingsFields.name: disableAllHooks
settingsFields.describe: Disable all hooks and statusLine execution

settingsFields.name: disableAutoMode
settingsFields.describe: Disable auto mode

settingsFields.name: disableBypassPermissionsMode
settingsFields.describe: Disable the ability to bypass permission prompts

settingsFields.name: disableDeepLinkRegistration
settingsFields.describe: Prevent claude-cli:// protocol handler registration with the OS

settingsFields.name: disabledMcpjsonServers
settingsFields.describe: List of rejected MCP servers from .mcp.json

settingsFields.name: disabledReason
settingsFields.describe: ISO timestamp captured at tool execution on the emitting process. Optional — resumed sessions replay pre-sentAt outputs verbatim.

settingsFields.name: disableSkillShellExecution
settingsFields.describe: Disable inline shell execution in skills and custom slash commands from user, project, or plugin sources. Commands are replaced with a placeholder instead of being run.

settingsFields.name: display
settingsFields.describe: Claude decides when and how much to think (Opus 4.6+).

settingsFields.name: display_name
settingsFields.describe: Requests permission to use a tool with the given input.

settingsFields.name: displayHeight
settingsFields.describe: Displayed image height in pixels (after resizing)

settingsFields.name: displayName
settingsFields.describe: Fields to prompt the user for when enabling this plugin in assistant mode. Saved values are substituted into ${user_config.KEY} references in the mcpServers env.

settingsFields.name: displayWidth
settingsFields.describe: Displayed image width in pixels (after resizing)

settingsFields.name: docs
settingsFields.describe: Documentation URL

settingsFields.name: dry_run
settingsFields.describe: Rewinds file changes made since a specific user message.

settingsFields.name: durationMs
settingsFields.describe: Time taken to execute the search in milliseconds

settingsFields.name: durationSeconds
settingsFields.describe: Time taken to complete the search operation

settingsFields.name: edit_mode
settingsFields.describe: The type of edit to make (replace, insert, delete). Defaults to replace.

settingsFields.name: effective
settingsFields.describe: Ordered low-to-high priority — later entries override earlier ones.

settingsFields.name: effortLevel
settingsFields.describe: Persisted effort level for supported models.

settingsFields.name: elicitation_id
settingsFields.describe: Hook input for the Elicitation event. Fired when an MCP server requests user input. Hooks can auto-respond (accept/decline) instead of showing the dialog.

settingsFields.name: email
settingsFields.describe: Contact email for support or feedback

settingsFields.name: enableAllProjectMcpServers
settingsFields.describe: Whether to automatically approve all MCP servers in the project

settingsFields.name: enabled
settingsFields.describe: Exit with an error at startup if sandbox.enabled is true but the sandbox cannot start (missing dependencies, unsupported platform, or platform not in enabledPlatforms). When false (default), a warning is shown and commands run unsandboxed. Intended for managed-settings deployments that require sandboxing as a hard gate.

settingsFields.name: enabledMcpjsonServers
settingsFields.describe: List of approved MCP servers from .mcp.json

settingsFields.name: end_time
settingsFields.describe: Wire-safe subset of TaskState fields that changed. Excludes abortController, unregisterCleanup, messages, result. Clients merge into their local task map.

settingsFields.name: entries
settingsFields.describe: @internal Emitted after each successful local transcript write. The parent peels these off the stdout stream and batches them to the SessionStore adapter. Not exposed to public SDK consumers.

settingsFields.name: environment
settingsFields.describe: Entries for the auto mode classifier environment section

settingsFields.name: error
settingsFields.describe: Server configuration (includes URL for HTTP/SSE servers)

settingsFields.name: error_count
settingsFields.describe: Refreshed commands, agents, plugins, and MCP server status after reload.

settingsFields.name: error_status
settingsFields.describe: Emitted when an API request fails with a retryable error and will be retried after a delay. error_status is null for connection errors (e.g. timeouts) that had no HTTP response.

settingsFields.name: errors
settingsFields.describe: Map of server names to error messages for servers that failed to connect

settingsFields.name: excludedCommands
settingsFields.describe: Custom ripgrep configuration for bundled ripgrep support

settingsFields.name: excludeDefault
settingsFields.describe: Override spinner tips. tips: array of tip strings. excludeDefault: if true, only show custom tips (default: false).

settingsFields.name: experimental
settingsFields.describe: Status information for an MCP server connection.

settingsFields.name: extensionToLanguage
settingsFields.describe: Mapping from file extension to LSP language ID. File extensions and languages are derived from this mapping.

settingsFields.name: failIfUnavailable
settingsFields.describe: Exit with an error at startup if sandbox.enabled is true but the sandbox cannot start (missing dependencies, unsupported platform, or platform not in enabledPlatforms). When false (default), a warning is shown and commands run unsandboxed. Intended for managed-settings deployments that require sandboxing as a hard gate.

settingsFields.name: fastMode
settingsFields.describe: When true, fast mode is enabled. When absent or false, fast mode is off.

settingsFields.name: fastModePerSessionOptIn
settingsFields.describe: When true, fast mode does not persist across sessions. Each session starts with fast mode off.

settingsFields.name: feedbackSurveyRate
settingsFields.describe: Probability (0–1) that the session quality survey appears when eligible. 0.05 is a reasonable starting point.

settingsFields.name: file
settingsFields.describe: Path to the settings file that failed to parse or validate.

settingsFields.name: fileCount
settingsFields.describe: Number of files containing results

settingsFields.name: filePath
settingsFields.describe: @internal Emitted after each successful local transcript write. The parent peels these off the stdout stream and batches them to the SessionStore adapter. Not exposed to public SDK consumers.

settingsFields.name: filesChanged
settingsFields.describe: Result of a rewindFiles operation.

settingsFields.name: fileSize
settingsFields.describe: File size in bytes. Only populated for local JSONL storage.

settingsFields.name: fileSuggestion
settingsFields.describe: Custom file suggestion configuration for @ mentions

settingsFields.name: firstPrompt
settingsFields.describe: First meaningful user prompt in the session.

settingsFields.name: forceLoginOrgUUID
settingsFields.describe: Organization UUID to require for OAuth login. Accepts a single UUID string or an array of UUIDs (any one is permitted). When set in managed settings, login fails if the authenticated account does not belong to a listed organization.

settingsFields.name: forceRemoteSettingsRefresh
settingsFields.describe: When set in managed settings, the CLI blocks startup until remote managed settings are freshly fetched, and exits if the fetch fails

settingsFields.name: forceRemoveDeletedPlugins
settingsFields.describe: When true, plugins removed from this marketplace will be automatically uninstalled and flagged for users

settingsFields.name: gcpAuthRefresh
settingsFields.describe: Command to refresh GCP authentication (e.g., gcloud auth application-default login)

settingsFields.name: gitBranch
settingsFields.describe: Git branch at the end of the session.

settingsFields.name: gitCommitSha
settingsFields.describe: Git commit SHA for git-based plugins (for version tracking)

settingsFields.name: hasFocus
settingsFields.describe: ISO timestamp captured at tool execution on the emitting process. Optional — resumed sessions replay pre-sentAt outputs verbatim.

settingsFields.name: hasTaskTool
settingsFields.describe: Whether the Agent tool is available in the current context

settingsFields.name: homepage
settingsFields.describe: Plugin homepage or documentation URL

settingsFields.name: hookCallbackIds
settingsFields.describe: Configuration for matching and routing hook callbacks.

settingsFields.name: hooks
settingsFields.describe: List of hooks to execute when the matcher matches

settingsFields.name: httpProxyPort
settingsFields.describe: Additional paths to allow writing within the sandbox. Merged with paths from Edit(...) allow permission rules.

settingsFields.name: idleSec
settingsFields.describe: ISO timestamp captured at tool execution on the emitting process. Optional — resumed sessions replay pre-sentAt outputs verbatim.

settingsFields.name: includeCoAuthoredBy
settingsFields.describe: Tool usage permissions configuration

settingsFields.name: includeGitInstructions
settingsFields.describe: Tool usage permissions configuration

settingsFields.name: innerToolCalls
settingsFields.describe: File-mutating inner tool calls — consumed by verificationInterceptor

settingsFields.name: input
settingsFields.describe: Why the query loop terminated. Unset when the loop was bypassed (local slash command) or interrupted externally (budget/retry limits checked between yields).

settingsFields.name: insertions
settingsFields.describe: Result of a rewindFiles operation.

settingsFields.name: installedAt
settingsFields.describe: ISO 8601 timestamp of installation

settingsFields.name: installLocation
settingsFields.describe: Local cache path where marketplace manifest is stored

settingsFields.name: installPath
settingsFields.describe: Absolute path to the installed plugin directory

settingsFields.name: interrupted
settingsFields.describe: Whether the command was interrupted

settingsFields.name: is_backgrounded
settingsFields.describe: Wire-safe subset of TaskState fields that changed. Excludes abortController, unregisterCleanup, messages, result. Clients merge into their local task map.

settingsFields.name: isAgent
settingsFields.describe: The file path where the plan was saved

settingsFields.name: isImage
settingsFields.describe: Resolved attachment metadata

settingsFields.name: issuer
settingsFields.describe: IdP issuer URL for OIDC discovery

settingsFields.name: isSynthetic
settingsFields.describe: When false, the message is appended to the transcript without triggering an assistant turn. It will be merged into the next user message that does query.

settingsFields.name: isUsingOverage
settingsFields.describe: Rate limit information for claude.ai subscription users.

settingsFields.name: jsonSchema
settingsFields.describe: @internal Additional system prompt appended to every Task-tool subagent (and propagated to nested subagents). Gated by CLAUDE_CODE_ENABLE_APPEND_SUBAGENT_PROMPT.

settingsFields.name: key
settingsFields.describe: Unique key for this option, returned in the response

settingsFields.name: keywords
settingsFields.describe: Tags for plugin discovery and categorization

settingsFields.name: label
settingsFields.describe: Display text for this option

settingsFields.name: language
settingsFields.describe: Skip the WebFetch blocklist check for enterprise environments with restrictive security policies

settingsFields.name: last_assistant_message
settingsFields.describe: Text content of the last assistant message before stopping. Avoids the need to read and parse the transcript file.

settingsFields.name: lastModified
settingsFields.describe: Last modified time in milliseconds since epoch.

settingsFields.name: lastUpdated
settingsFields.describe: ISO 8601 timestamp of last update

settingsFields.name: license
settingsFields.describe: SPDX license identifier (e.g., MIT, Apache-2.0)

settingsFields.name: line
settingsFields.describe: The line number (1-based, as shown in editors)

settingsFields.name: lines
settingsFields.describe: GitHub owner/repo when available

settingsFields.name: localSent
settingsFields.describe: ISO timestamp captured at tool execution on the emitting process. Optional — resumed sessions replay pre-sentAt outputs verbatim.

settingsFields.name: lspServers
settingsFields.describe: Path to .lsp.json configuration file relative to plugin root

settingsFields.name: marketplace
settingsFields.describe: Currently installed version

settingsFields.name: matcher
settingsFields.describe: List of hooks to execute when the matcher matches

settingsFields.name: max
settingsFields.describe: Maximum value (number type only)

settingsFields.name: max_results
settingsFields.describe: Maximum number of results to return (default: 5)

settingsFields.name: max_retries
settingsFields.describe: Emitted when an API request fails with a retryable error and will be retried after a delay. error_status is null for connection errors (e.g. timeouts) that had no HTTP response.

settingsFields.name: max_thinking_tokens
settingsFields.describe: Sets the maximum number of thinking tokens for extended thinking.

settingsFields.name: maxOutputTokens
settingsFields.describe: Config scope for settings.

settingsFields.name: maxRestarts
settingsFields.describe: Maximum number of restart attempts before giving up

settingsFields.name: mcp_server_name
settingsFields.describe: Hook input for the Elicitation event. Fired when an MCP server requests user input. Hooks can auto-respond (accept/decline) instead of showing the dialog.

settingsFields.name: memory_paths
settingsFields.describe: @internal Absolute directory paths for the auto-memory and team-memory stores. Lets SDK renderers classify Read/Write/Edit tool calls on these paths as memory operations without re-implementing CLI path detection.

settingsFields.name: message_uuid
settingsFields.describe: Drops a pending async user message from the command queue by uuid. No-op if already dequeued for execution.

settingsFields.name: metadata
settingsFields.describe: Base path for relative plugin sources

settingsFields.name: mimeType
settingsFields.describe: MIME type of the resource

settingsFields.name: min
settingsFields.describe: Minimum value (number type only)

settingsFields.name: minimumVersion
settingsFields.describe: Minimum version to stay on - prevents downgrades when switching to stable channel

settingsFields.name: model
settingsFields.describe: Custom status message to display in spinner while hook runs

settingsFields.name: modelOverrides
settingsFields.describe: Whether to automatically approve all MCP servers in the project

settingsFields.name: monitors
settingsFields.describe: Path to a JSON file containing the monitors array, relative to the plugin root

settingsFields.name: mtime
settingsFields.describe: Seeds the readFileState cache with a path+mtime entry. Use when a prior Read was removed from context so Edit validation would fail despite the client having observed the Read. The mtime lets the CLI detect if the file changed since the seeded Read — same staleness check as the normal path.

settingsFields.name: multiple
settingsFields.describe: For string type: allow an array of strings

settingsFields.name: multiSelect
settingsFields.describe: Set to true to allow the user to select multiple options instead of just one. Use when choices are not mutually exclusive.

settingsFields.name: needs_action
settingsFields.describe: @internal Background post-turn summary emitted after each assistant turn. summarizes_uuid points to the assistant message this summarizes.

settingsFields.name: new_source
settingsFields.describe: The new source for the cell

settingsFields.name: new_string
settingsFields.describe: The text to replace it with (must be different from old_string)

settingsFields.name: newContent
settingsFields.describe: Internal: pre-computed sed edit result from preview

settingsFields.name: newLines
settingsFields.describe: GitHub owner/repo when available

settingsFields.name: newStart
settingsFields.describe: GitHub owner/repo when available

settingsFields.name: newString
settingsFields.describe: The new string that replaced it

settingsFields.name: noOutputExpected
settingsFields.describe: Whether the command is expected to produce no output on success

settingsFields.name: notebook_path
settingsFields.describe: The absolute path to the Jupyter notebook file to edit (must be absolute, not relative)

settingsFields.name: notes
settingsFields.describe: Free-text notes the user added to their selection.

settingsFields.name: ok
settingsFields.describe: Whether the condition was met

settingsFields.name: old_string
settingsFields.describe: The text to replace

settingsFields.name: oldLines
settingsFields.describe: GitHub owner/repo when available

settingsFields.name: oldStart
settingsFields.describe: GitHub owner/repo when available

settingsFields.name: oldString
settingsFields.describe: The original string that was replaced

settingsFields.name: once
settingsFields.describe: If true, hook runs once and is removed after execution

settingsFields.name: openWorld
settingsFields.describe: Tools provided by this server (available when connected)

settingsFields.name: operation
settingsFields.describe: The absolute or relative path to the file

settingsFields.name: options
settingsFields.describe: Non-sensitive option values from plugin manifest userConfig, keyed by option name. Sensitive values go to secure storage instead.

settingsFields.name: original_file
settingsFields.describe: The original notebook content before modification

settingsFields.name: originalFile
settingsFields.describe: The original file contents before editing

settingsFields.name: originalHeight
settingsFields.describe: Original image height in pixels

settingsFields.name: originalSize
settingsFields.describe: Original file size in bytes

settingsFields.name: originalWidth
settingsFields.describe: Original image width in pixels

settingsFields.name: otelHeadersHelper
settingsFields.describe: Path to a script that outputs OpenTelemetry headers

settingsFields.name: outputDir
settingsFields.describe: Directory containing extracted page images

settingsFields.name: outputFile
settingsFields.describe: Path to the output file for checking agent progress

settingsFields.name: outputStyle
settingsFields.describe: Controls the output style for assistant responses

settingsFields.name: outputStyles
settingsFields.describe: Path to additional output styles directory or file (in addition to those in the output-styles/ directory, if it exists), relative to the plugin root

settingsFields.name: package
settingsFields.describe: Python package name as it appears on PyPI

settingsFields.name: padding
settingsFields.describe: Re-run the status line command every N seconds in addition to event-driven updates

settingsFields.name: pages
settingsFields.describe: The path to the file that was read

settingsFields.name: parent_tool_use_id
settingsFields.describe: When false, the message is appended to the transcript without triggering an assistant turn. It will be merged into the next user message that does query.

settingsFields.name: path
settingsFields.describe: Path to marketplace.json within repo (defaults to .claude-plugin/marketplace.json)

settingsFields.name: pattern
settingsFields.describe: The regular expression pattern to search for in file contents

settingsFields.name: payload
settingsFields.describe: Dialog-specific data passed to the host renderer. Shape is defined per dialog_kind; the protocol transports it opaquely.

settingsFields.name: pending_permission_requests
settingsFields.describe: Cancels a currently open control request.

settingsFields.name: permission_mode
settingsFields.describe: Subagent identifier. Present only when the hook fires from within a subagent (e.g., a tool called by an AgentTool worker). Absent for the main thread, even in --agent sessions. Use this field (not agent_type) to distinguish subagent calls from main-thread calls.

settingsFields.name: permission_policy
settingsFields.describe: Per-tool permission policy carried on mcp_set_servers for remote servers.

settingsFields.name: persistedOutputPath
settingsFields.describe: Path to persisted full output when too large for inline

settingsFields.name: persistedOutputSize
settingsFields.describe: Total output size in bytes when persisted

settingsFields.name: persistent
settingsFields.describe: Run for the lifetime of the session (no timeout). Use for session-length watches like PR monitoring or log tails. Stop with TaskStop.

settingsFields.name: pid
settingsFields.describe: @internal CLI process PID for tmux socket isolation

settingsFields.name: plan
settingsFields.describe: The plan content (injected by normalizeToolInput from disk)

settingsFields.name: plansDirectory
settingsFields.describe: Custom directory for plan files, relative to project root. If not set, defaults to ~/.claude/plans/

settingsFields.name: planWasEdited
settingsFields.describe: True when the user edited the plan (CCR web UI or Ctrl+G); determines whether the plan is echoed back in tool_result

settingsFields.name: plugin
settingsFields.describe: Reduce or disable animations for accessibility (spinner shimmer, flash effects, etc.)

settingsFields.name: pluginConfigs
settingsFields.describe: User configuration values for MCP servers keyed by server name

settingsFields.name: pluginRoot
settingsFields.describe: Base path for relative plugin sources

settingsFields.name: plugins
settingsFields.describe: Plugin entries declared inline in settings.json

settingsFields.name: pr
settingsFields.describe: Attribution text for pull request descriptions. Empty string hides attribution.

settingsFields.name: prefersReducedMotion
settingsFields.describe: Reduce or disable animations for accessibility (spinner shimmer, flash effects, etc.)

settingsFields.name: preserved_segment
settingsFields.describe: Relink info for messagesToKeep. Loaders splice the preserved segment at anchor_uuid (summary for suffix-preserving, boundary for prefix-preserving partial compact) so resume includes preserved content. Unset when compaction summarizes everything (no messagesToKeep).

settingsFields.name: preview
settingsFields.describe: Optional preview content rendered when this option is focused. Use for mockups, code snippets, or visual comparisons that help users compare options. See the tool description for the expected content format.

settingsFields.name: priority
settingsFields.describe: When false, the message is appended to the transcript without triggering an assistant turn. It will be merged into the next user message that does query.

settingsFields.name: projectKey
settingsFields.describe: @internal Emitted when SessionStore.append() rejects or times out for a transcript-mirror batch. The batch is dropped (at-most-once delivery); this surfaces the failure so consumers are not silent on data loss.

settingsFields.name: projectPath
settingsFields.describe: Project path (required for project/local scopes)

settingsFields.name: prompt
settingsFields.describe: Prompt to evaluate with LLM. Use $ARGUMENTS placeholder for hook input JSON.

settingsFields.name: prompt_response
settingsFields.describe: The request ID from the corresponding prompt request

settingsFields.name: promptSuggestionEnabled
settingsFields.describe: When false, prompt suggestions are disabled. When absent or true, prompt suggestions are enabled.

settingsFields.name: promptSuggestions
settingsFields.describe: Initializes the SDK session with hooks, MCP servers, and agent configuration.

settingsFields.name: proxyAuthHelper
settingsFields.describe: Shell command that outputs a Proxy-Authorization header value (EAP)

settingsFields.name: pushSent
settingsFields.describe: ISO timestamp captured at tool execution on the emitting process. Optional — resumed sessions replay pre-sentAt outputs verbatim.

settingsFields.name: query
settingsFields.describe: The search query to use

settingsFields.name: questions
settingsFields.describe: Questions to ask the user (1-4 questions)

settingsFields.name: rawOutputPath
settingsFields.describe: Path to raw output file for large MCP tool outputs

settingsFields.name: readOnly
settingsFields.describe: Tools provided by this server (available when connected)

settingsFields.name: recent_action
settingsFields.describe: @internal Background post-turn summary emitted after each assistant turn. summarizes_uuid points to the assistant message this summarizes.

settingsFields.name: ref
settingsFields.describe: Path to marketplace.json within repo (defaults to .claude-plugin/marketplace.json)

settingsFields.name: refreshInterval
settingsFields.describe: Re-run the status line command every N seconds in addition to event-driven updates

settingsFields.name: registeredTools
settingsFields.describe: Names of tools registered during this execution

settingsFields.name: registry
settingsFields.describe: Custom NPM registry URL (defaults to using system default, likely npmjs.org)

settingsFields.name: remote
settingsFields.describe: Default environment ID to use for remote sessions

settingsFields.name: removed
settingsFields.describe: Names of servers that were removed

settingsFields.name: replaceAll
settingsFields.describe: Whether all occurrences were replaced

settingsFields.name: repo
settingsFields.describe: GitHub repository in owner/repo format

settingsFields.name: repository
settingsFields.describe: Source code repository URL

settingsFields.name: requested_schema
settingsFields.describe: Hook input for the Elicitation event. Fired when an MCP server requests user input. Hooks can auto-respond (accept/decline) instead of showing the dialog.

settingsFields.name: required
settingsFields.describe: If true, validation fails when this field is empty

settingsFields.name: rerun
settingsFields.describe: Internal: pre-computed sed edit result from preview

settingsFields.name: resolvedVersion
settingsFields.describe: Tag-derived semver this install resolved to (when fetched via a version constraint). Used by verifyAndDemote in preference to manifest.version, since the upstream may have forgotten to bump plugin.json.

settingsFields.name: respectGitignore
settingsFields.describe: Whether file picker should respect .gitignore files (default: true). Note: .ignore files are always respected.

settingsFields.name: restartOnCrash
settingsFields.describe: Whether to restart the server if it crashes

settingsFields.name: resultCount
settingsFields.describe: Number of results (definitions, references, symbols)

settingsFields.name: results
settingsFields.describe: Search results and/or text commentary from the model

settingsFields.name: resultTokens
settingsFields.describe: Breakdown of current context window usage by category (system prompt, tools, messages, etc.).

settingsFields.name: retry_delay_ms
settingsFields.describe: Emitted when an API request fails with a retryable error and will be retried after a delay. error_status is null for connection errors (e.g. timeouts) that had no HTTP response.

settingsFields.name: returnCodeInterpretation
settingsFields.describe: Semantic interpretation for non-error exit codes with special meaning

settingsFields.name: rewakeMessage
settingsFields.describe: @internal Custom prefix for the system-reminder shown to the model when an asyncRewake hook exits with code 2. The hook output is appended after this prefix.

settingsFields.name: rewakeSummary
settingsFields.describe: LLM prompt hook type

settingsFields.name: ripgrep
settingsFields.describe: Custom ripgrep configuration for bundled ripgrep support

settingsFields.name: run_in_background
settingsFields.describe: Set to true to run this agent in the background. You will be notified when it completes.

settingsFields.name: scheduledFor
settingsFields.describe: Epoch ms timestamp when the next wakeup will fire

settingsFields.name: schema
settingsFields.describe: JSON Schema reference for Claude Code settings

settingsFields.name: scope
settingsFields.describe: Configuration scope (e.g., project, user, local, claudeai, managed)

settingsFields.name: sdkMcpServers
settingsFields.describe: @internal Additional system prompt appended to every Task-tool subagent (and propagated to nested subagents). Gated by CLAUDE_CODE_ENABLE_APPEND_SUBAGENT_PROMPT.

settingsFields.name: selected
settingsFields.describe: The key of the selected option

settingsFields.name: sensitive
settingsFields.describe: If true, masks dialog input and stores value in secure storage (keychain/credentials file) instead of settings.json

settingsFields.name: sentAt
settingsFields.describe: ISO timestamp captured at tool execution on the emitting process. Optional — resumed sessions replay pre-sentAt outputs verbatim.

settingsFields.name: server_name
settingsFields.describe: Sends a JSON-RPC message to a specific MCP server.

settingsFields.name: serverCommand
settingsFields.describe: Command array [command, ...args] to match exactly for allowed stdio servers

settingsFields.name: serverInfo
settingsFields.describe: Server information (available when connected)

settingsFields.name: serverName
settingsFields.describe: Name of the MCP server that users are allowed to configure

settingsFields.name: servers
settingsFields.describe: Replaces the set of dynamically managed MCP servers.

settingsFields.name: session_id
settingsFields.describe: Subagent identifier. Present only when the hook fires from within a subagent (e.g., a tool called by an AgentTool worker). Absent for the main thread, even in --agent sessions. Use this field (not agent_type) to distinguish subagent calls from main-thread calls.

settingsFields.name: sessionId
settingsFields.describe: @internal Emitted when SessionStore.append() rejects or times out for a transcript-mirror batch. The batch is dropped (at-most-once delivery); this surfaces the failure so consumers are not silent on data loss.

settingsFields.name: setting
settingsFields.describe: The new value. Omit to get current value.

settingsFields.name: settings
settingsFields.describe: Settings to merge when plugin is enabled. Only keys in PLUGIN_SETTINGS_KEYS (pluginSettingsKeys.ts) are kept

settingsFields.name: shell
settingsFields.describe: Timeout in seconds for this specific command

settingsFields.name: shell_id
settingsFields.describe: Deprecated: use task_id instead

settingsFields.name: shouldQuery
settingsFields.describe: When false, the message is appended to the transcript without triggering an assistant turn. It will be merged into the next user message that does query.

settingsFields.name: showThinkingSummaries

settingsFields.name: shutdownTimeout
settingsFields.describe: Maximum time to wait for graceful shutdown (milliseconds)

settingsFields.name: size
settingsFields.describe: Resolved attachment metadata

settingsFields.name: skill
settingsFields.describe: The name of a skill from the available-skills list. Do not guess names.

settingsFields.name: skillListingBudgetFraction
settingsFields.describe: Fraction of the context window (in characters) reserved for the skill listing sent to Claude (default: 0.01 = 1%). When the listing exceeds this, descriptions are shortened to fit. Raise to opt in to higher per-turn context cost.

settingsFields.name: skillListingMaxDescChars
settingsFields.describe: Per-skill description character cap in the skill listing sent to Claude (default: 1536). Descriptions longer than this are truncated. Raise to opt in to higher per-turn context cost.

settingsFields.name: skills
settingsFields.describe: Path to additional skill directory (in addition to those in the skills/ directory, if it exists), relative to the plugin root

settingsFields.name: skipAutoPermissionPrompt

settingsFields.name: soft_deny
settingsFields.describe: Rules for the auto mode classifier deny section

settingsFields.describe: Direct URL to marketplace.json file

settingsFields.name: sources
settingsFields.describe: Ordered low-to-high priority — later entries override earlier ones.

settingsFields.name: sparsePaths
settingsFields.describe: Full git repository URL

settingsFields.describe: Whether to show tips in the spinner

settingsFields.describe: Override spinner tips. tips: array of tip strings. excludeDefault: if true, only show custom tips (default: false).

settingsFields.describe: Path to SSH identity file (private key)

settingsFields.describe: SSH port (default: 22)

settingsFields.name: staleReadFileStateHint

settingsFields.name: startLine
settingsFields.describe: The starting line number

settingsFields.name: startupTimeout
settingsFields.describe: Maximum time to wait for server startup (milliseconds)

settingsFields.name: status
settingsFields.describe: Current connection status

settingsFields.name: status_category
settingsFields.describe: @internal Background post-turn summary emitted after each assistant turn. summarizes_uuid points to the assistant message this summarizes.

settingsFields.name: status_detail
settingsFields.describe: @internal Background post-turn summary emitted after each assistant turn. summarizes_uuid points to the assistant message this summarizes.

settingsFields.name: taskId

settingsFields.name: terminalTitleFromRename
settingsFields.describe: Whether /rename updates the terminal tab title (defaults to true). Set to false to keep auto-generated topic titles.

settingsFields.name: text
settingsFields.describe: Loop-side text notification. Mirrors the interactive REPL notification queue (key/priority/timeout). JSX notifications are not emitted on this channel.

settingsFields.name: timeout
settingsFields.describe: Timeout in seconds for this specific command

settingsFields.name: timeout_ms
settingsFields.describe: Loop-side text notification. Mirrors the interactive REPL notification queue (key/priority/timeout). JSX notifications are not emitted on this channel.

settingsFields.name: timeoutMs
settingsFields.describe: Timeout deadline in milliseconds (0 when persistent).

settingsFields.name: tips
settingsFields.describe: Override spinner tips. tips: array of tip strings. excludeDefault: if true, only show custom tips (default: false).

settingsFields.name: title
settingsFields.describe: Human-readable label shown in the config dialog

settingsFields.name: tool
settingsFields.describe: The tool this prompt applies to

settingsFields.name: tool_input
